mapper.sql: id, user_id, doctor_id, schedule_time_id, `status`, amount, created_at
mapper.insert:
insert into appointments
user_id,
doctor_id,
schedule_time_id,
`status`,
amount,
created_at,
#{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{doctorId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{scheduleTimeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update appointments
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
doctor_id = #{doctorId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
schedule_time_id = #{scheduleTimeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
amount = #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update appointments set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, doctor_id = #{doctorId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, schedule_time_id = #{scheduleTimeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, amount = #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
